description_text: Product Description 4Pcs Universal Car Rear Bumper Lip Diffuser Shark Fin Plane Spoiler Anti-crash Universal Car SUV Rear Bumper Diffuser Molding Shark Fin Spoiler Protector Cover Anti-crash and anti wear. 100% Brand new and high quality. Quantity: 4Pcs Type：Plane Protect your car from damage Easy to install Long service life and durability Practical and beautiful Colour:black Material:ABS Size:15*3*5CM Package Contents: 4*Rear Bumper Spoiler 1* Roll double-sided adhesive tape 16*Screws Payment Shipping Returns Contact Us Payment should be completed within 4 days after buyer places the order,or else an unpaid case will be opened in order to cancel the transaction. If you can not pay in time, please contact us. All of the items will be shipped to buyer's EBAY address,please confirm your address on Ebay before you buy.
